title: Loser
why_this_song: Loser by Beck (1994) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Kill the headlights and put it in neutral"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Stock car flamin' with a loser and the cruise control"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Don't believe everything that you breathe"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I'm a loser baby, so why don't you kill me?"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Soy un perdedor"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "kill" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "kill" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "loser" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "loser" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: With the plastic eyeballs, spray-paint the vegetables
Forces of evil in a bozo nightmare

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Dog food stalls with the beefcake pantyhose
(Things are gonna change I can feel it)

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Loser" was released in 1994. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Loser" foi lançada em 1994. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Loser" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Loser" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
